name: Adjustable Handheld Roller - All In Motion™: TPR Manual Body Massager
description:
Why we're ALL IN:

Massage your body before and after workouts with the handheld roller. Made from rubber and featuring an adjustable design with ridges for a firm, flexible grip on your body. Side handles offer easy holding and maneuvering. Light cyan color lends an appealing look.

All in Motion™: Inspiring the potential in every body.
